purpose: Preserve real repository drift cases as negative fixtures before repair. The documentation-conformance checker must fail these synthetic cases and pass the repaired repository.

brokenExamples: section heading describes Exporting active decision output
cases.allowedContext: Promotion or Export Operation internal status only
cases.expectedRepair: Run adoption state is promoting everywhere
All active canonical and verification documents are inventoried

cases.historyFinding: These paths never existed in Git history and must not be advertised as preserved
cases.expectedRepair: Delist absent archive files; do not reconstruct them

cases.brokenExample: Claims original lines 1-440 were preserved although the committed file contained only the short summary from its first revision
cases.expectedRepair: State honestly that the full original draft is not present in this repository

brokenExamples: CommandAccepted uses statusUrl instead of statusPath
pair, logout, and operation-status routes omitted

cases.brokenExample: spec/17 listed only accepted, running, completed, failed, and cancelled while both shared unions also defined reconciling and interrupted
cases.rule: ApiOperationState, OperationState, and the spec/17 status table must contain the same closed state set and interrupted must remain nonterminal.
cases.expectedRepair: Add reconciling and interrupted rows plus their timestamp, result, error, and transition semantics
CLI list matches spec/13 closed command surface

cases.brokenExample: Depends on or cites canonical specs 01-14
cases.expectedRepair: Reference the canonical reading order or document manifest instead of a numeric range

cases.scope: All active implementation Markdown outside archive and conformance regression fixtures
cases.rule: All active implementation documents must state one identical reference-platform value; the repaired value is Windows 11 x64.
cases.expectedRepair: One explicit Windows 11 x64 reference target throughout active implementation documents

cases.brokenExample: Claims exact MVP route inventory without explaining that /session/pair is a separate pre-authentication route
cases.expectedRepair: Declare authenticated-only scope and reference the pairing route contract
